text: I feel strangely out of balance, like I have entered a world slightly askew from my own. The architecture around me is immaculately clean and open, bordering on sterile, almost too pristine for true comfort. As I move onward, the bright, colorful wall draws me in, promising knowledge and progress—R + D—a celebration of human potential and innovation. Yet, I sense a subtle disconnect: so much energy devoted to rational understanding and technological advance, yet in my core I yearn for orientation, grounding, and meaning amid all this polish and invention. I am both invigorated and a little lost.
